targetTranslation: He is exalted, He is full of blessings (refers to Allah)
ayahArabic: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ ٱلْفُرْقَانَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ لِيَكُونَ لِلْعٰلَمِينَ نَذِيرًا

targetTranslation: the one who/which (describes the owner of مُلْكُ)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَدًا وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ شَرِيكٌ فِى ٱلْمُلْكِ وَخَلَقَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ تَقْدِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He to whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and who has not taken a son and has not had a partner in dominion and has created each thing and determined it with [precise] determination.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً لَّا يَخْلُقُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَهُمْ يُخْلَقُونَ وَلَا يَمْلِكُونَ لِأَنفُسِهِمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُونَ مَوْتًا وَلَا حَيَوٰةً وَلَا نُشُورًا
ayahEnglish: But they have taken besides Him gods which create nothing, while they are created, and possess not for themselves any harm or benefit and possess not [power to cause] death or life or resurrection.

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِنْ هٰذَآ إِلَّآ إِفْكٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ وَأَعَانَهُۥ عَلَيْهِ قَوْمٌ ءَاخَرُونَ فَقَدْ جَآءُو ظُلْمًا وَزُورًا
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "This [Qur’ān] is not except a falsehood he invented, and another people assisted him in it." But they have committed an injustice and a lie.

targetTranslation: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell what follows)
ayahArabic: قُلْ أَنزَلَهُ ٱلَّذِى يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "It has been revealed by He who knows [every] secret within the heavens and the earth. Indeed, He is ever Forgiving and Merciful."

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ مَالِ هٰذَا ٱلرَّسُولِ يَأْكُلُ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشِى فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مَلَكٌ فَيَكُونَ مَعَهُۥ نَذِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And they say, "What is this messenger that eats food and walks in the markets? Why was there not sent down to him an angel so he would be with him a warner?

targetTranslation: He is supremely blessed (referring to Allah)
ayahArabic: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِن شَآءَ جَعَلَ لَكَ خَيْرًا مِّن ذٰلِكَ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ وَيَجْعَل لَّكَ قُصُورًۢا
ayahEnglish: Blessed is He who, if He willed, could have made for you [something] better than that - gardens beneath which rivers flow - and could make for you palaces.

ayahArabic: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلسَّاعَةِ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لِمَن كَذَّبَ بِٱلسَّاعَةِ سَعِيرًا
ayahEnglish: But they have denied the Hour, and We have prepared for those who deny the Hour a Blaze.

ayahEnglish: When it [i.e., the Hellfire] sees them from a distant place, they will hear its fury and roaring.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ مِنْهَا مَكَانًا ضَيِّقًا مُّقَرَّنِينَ دَعَوْا۟ هُنَالِكَ ثُبُورًا

ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Do not cry this Day for one destruction but cry for much destruction."

ayahArabic: قُلْ أَذٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ أَمْ جَنَّةُ ٱلْخُلْدِ ٱلَّتِى وُعِدَ ٱلْمُتَّقُونَ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَزَآءً وَمَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Say, "Is that better or the Garden of Eternity which is promised to the righteous? It will be for them a reward and destination.

ayahArabic: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوكُم بِمَا تَقُولُونَ فَمَا تَسْتَطِيعُونَ صَرْفًا وَلَا نَصْرًا وَمَن يَظْلِم مِّنكُمْ نُذِقْهُ عَذَابًا كَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: So they will deny you, [disbelievers], in what you say, and you cannot avert [punishment] or [find] help. And whoever commits injustice among you - We will make him taste a great punishment.

targetTranslation: we sent forth (connected to قَبْلَكَ - before you)
ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ إِلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشُونَ فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ وَجَعَلْنَا بَعْضَكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ فِتْنَةً أَتَصْبِرُونَ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And We did not send before you, [O Muḥammad], any of the messengers except that they ate food and walked in the markets. And We have made some of you [people] as trial for others - will you have patience? And ever is your Lord, Seeing.

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ لِقَآءَنَا لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ عَلَيْنَا ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ أَوْ نَرَىٰ رَبَّنَا لَقَدِ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَعَتَوْ عُتُوًّا كَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And those who do not expect the meeting with Us say, "Why were not angels sent down to us, or [why] do we [not] see our Lord?" They have certainly become arrogant within themselves and [become] insolent with great insolence.

ayahEnglish: And those who do not expect the meeting with Us say, "Why were not angels sent down to us, or [why] do we [not] see our Lord?" They have certainly become arrogant within themselves and [become] insolent with great insolence.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ لَا بُشْرَىٰ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَيَقُولُونَ حِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا
ayahEnglish: The day they see the angels - no good tidings will there be that day for the criminals, and [the angels] will say, "Prevented and inaccessible."

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ لَا بُشْرَىٰ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَيَقُولُونَ حِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا

ayahArabic: وَقَدِمْنَآ إِلَىٰ مَا عَمِلُوا۟ مِنْ عَمَلٍ فَجَعَلْنٰهُ هَبَآءً مَّنثُورًا
ayahEnglish: And We will approach [i.e., regard] what they have done of deeds and make them as dust dispersed.

ayahArabic: أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَيْرٌ مُّسْتَقَرًّا وَأَحْسَنُ مَقِيلًا
ayahEnglish: The companions of Paradise, that Day, are [in] a better settlement and better resting place.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِٱلْغَمٰمِ وَنُزِّلَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ تَنزِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And [mention] the Day when the heaven will split open with [emerging] clouds, and the angels will be sent down in successive descent.

targetTranslation: a sending down (as a direct object)
ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِٱلْغَمٰمِ وَنُزِّلَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ تَنزِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And [mention] the Day when the heaven will split open with [emerging] clouds, and the angels will be sent down in successive descent.

ayahArabic: ٱلْمُلْكُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَكَانَ يَوْمًا عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ عَسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: True sovereignty, that Day, is for the Most Merciful. And it will be upon the disbelievers a difficult Day.

ayahArabic: ٱلْمُلْكُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَكَانَ يَوْمًا عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ عَسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: True sovereignty, that Day, is for the Most Merciful. And it will be upon the disbelievers a difficult Day.

targetTranslation: difficult (describing the day for the disbelievers)
ayahArabic: ٱلْمُلْكُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ وَكَانَ يَوْمًا عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ عَسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: True sovereignty, that Day, is for the Most Merciful. And it will be upon the disbelievers a difficult Day.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ يَعَضُّ ٱلظَّالِمُ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ يَقُولُ يٰلَيْتَنِى ٱتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ ٱلرَّسُولِ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And the Day the wrongdoer will bite on his hands [in regret] he will say, "Oh, I wish I had taken with the Messenger a way.

ayahArabic: وَيَوْمَ يَعَضُّ ٱلظَّالِمُ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ يَقُولُ يٰلَيْتَنِى ٱتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ ٱلرَّسُولِ سَبِيلًا

ayahEnglish: Oh, woe to me! I wish I had not taken that one as a friend.

ayahEnglish: He led me away from the remembrance after it had come to me. And ever is Satan, to man, a deserter."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلرَّسُولُ يٰرَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مَهْجُورًا
ayahEnglish: And the Messenger has said, "O my Lord, indeed my people have taken this Qur’ān as [a thing] abandoned."

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلرَّسُولُ يٰرَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مَهْجُورًا
ayahEnglish: And the Messenger has said, "O my Lord, indeed my people have taken this Qur’ān as [a thing] abandoned."

ayahEnglish: And the Messenger has said, "O my Lord, indeed my people have taken this Qur’ān as [a thing] abandoned."

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِىٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus have We made for every prophet an enemy from among the criminals. But sufficient is your Lord as a guide and a helper.

targetTranslation: a prophet (object of لِكُلِّ - for every)
ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِىٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus have We made for every prophet an enemy from among the criminals. But sufficient is your Lord as a guide and a helper.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِىٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus have We made for every prophet an enemy from among the criminals. But sufficient is your Lord as a guide and a helper.

ayahArabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِىٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And thus have We made for every prophet an enemy from among the criminals. But sufficient is your Lord as a guide and a helper.

ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ جُمْلَةً وٰحِدَةً كَذٰلِكَ لِنُثَبِّتَ بِهِۦ فُؤَادَكَ وَرَتَّلْنٰهُ تَرْتِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "Why was the Qur’ān not revealed to him all at once?" Thus [it is] that We may strengthen thereby your heart. And We have spaced it distinctly.

ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "Why was the Qur’ān not revealed to him all at once?" Thus [it is] that We may strengthen thereby your heart. And We have spaced it distinctly.

ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "Why was the Qur’ān not revealed to him all at once?" Thus [it is] that We may strengthen thereby your heart. And We have spaced it distinctly.

targetTranslation: in a clearly arranged manner (describing how رَتَّلْنٰهُ was done)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ جُمْلَةً وٰحِدَةً كَذٰلِكَ لِنُثَبِّتَ بِهِۦ فُؤَادَكَ وَرَتَّلْنٰهُ تَرْتِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve say, "Why was the Qur’ān not revealed to him all at once?" Thus [it is] that We may strengthen thereby your heart. And We have spaced it distinctly.

targetTranslation: they come to you (object of جِئْنٰكَ)
ayahArabic: وَلَا يَأْتُونَكَ بِمَثَلٍ إِلَّا جِئْنٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَحْسَنَ تَفْسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And they do not come to you with an example [i.e., argument] except that We bring you the truth and the best explanation.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَأْتُونَكَ بِمَثَلٍ إِلَّا جِئْنٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَحْسَنَ تَفْسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And they do not come to you with an example [i.e., argument] except that We bring you the truth and the best explanation.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَأْتُونَكَ بِمَثَلٍ إِلَّا جِئْنٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَحْسَنَ تَفْسِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And they do not come to you with an example [i.e., argument] except that We bring you the truth and the best explanation.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُحْشَرُونَ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: The ones who are gathered on their faces to Hell - those are the worst in position and farthest astray in [their] way.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ وَجَعَلْنَا مَعَهُۥٓ أَخَاهُ هٰرُونَ وَزِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture and appointed with him his brother Aaron as an assistant.

targetTranslation: Moses (the prophet who received the Torah)

targetTranslation: both of you go! (command to two people)
ayahArabic: فَقُلْنَا ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَدَمَّرْنٰهُمْ تَدْمِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And We said, "Go both of you to the people who have denied Our signs." Then We destroyed them with [complete] destruction.

ayahArabic: فَقُلْنَا ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا فَدَمَّرْنٰهُمْ تَدْمِيرًا

ayahEnglish: And We said, "Go both of you to the people who have denied Our signs." Then We destroyed them with [complete] destruction.

ayahArabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ لَّمَّا كَذَّبُوا۟ ٱلرُّسُلَ أَغْرَقْنٰهُمْ وَجَعَلْنٰهُمْ لِلنَّاسِ ءَايَةً وَأَعْتَدْنَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And the people of Noah - when they denied the messengers, We drowned them, and We made them for mankind a sign. And We have prepared for the wrongdoers a painful punishment.

ayahArabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ لَّمَّا كَذَّبُوا۟ ٱلرُّسُلَ أَغْرَقْنٰهُمْ وَجَعَلْنٰهُمْ لِلنَّاسِ ءَايَةً وَأَعْتَدْنَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا

ayahArabic: وَعَادًا وَثَمُودَا۟ وَأَصْحٰبَ ٱلرَّسِّ وَقُرُونًۢا بَيْنَ ذٰلِكَ كَثِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And [We destroyed] ʿAad and Thamūd and the companions of the well and many generations between them.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَى ٱلْقَرْيَةِ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُمْطِرَتْ مَطَرَ ٱلسَّوْءِ أَفَلَمْ يَكُونُوا۟ يَرَوْنَهَا بَلْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ نُشُورًا
ayahEnglish: And they have already come upon the town which was showered with a rain of evil [i.e., stones]. So have they not seen it? But they are not expecting resurrection.

ayahEnglish: And when they see you, [O Muḥammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], "Is this the one whom Allāh has sent as a messenger?

targetTranslation: we sent you (as a messenger to people)

ayahEnglish: And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner.

targetTranslation: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell what follows)
ayahArabic: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ أَن يَتَّخِذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Say, "I do not ask of you for it any payment - only that whoever wills might take to his Lord a way."

targetTranslation: who/which/that (connects to لَا يَمُوتُ - who does not die)
ayahArabic: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْحَىِّ ٱلَّذِى لَا يَمُوتُ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِهِۦ وَكَفَىٰ بِهِۦ بِذُنُوبِ عِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: And rely upon the Ever-Living who does not die, and exalt [Allāh] with His praise. And sufficient is He to be, with the sins of His servants, [fully] Aware -

targetTranslation: The one who (subject of خَلَقَ - created)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ فَسْـَٔلْ بِهِۦ خَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He who created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days and then established Himself above the Throne - the Most Merciful, so ask about Him one well informed [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)].

targetTranslation: he created (subject of الَّذِى - The One Who)

ayahEnglish: He who created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days and then established Himself above the Throne - the Most Merciful, so ask about Him one well informed [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)].

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ فَسْـَٔلْ بِهِۦ خَبِيرًا
ayahEnglish: He who created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days and then established Himself above the Throne - the Most Merciful, so ask about Him one well informed [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)].

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ قَالُوا۟ وَمَا ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ أَنَسْجُدُ لِمَا تَأْمُرُنَا وَزَادَهُمْ نُفُورًا
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Prostrate to the Most Merciful," they say, "And what is the Most Merciful? Should we prostrate to that which you order us?" And it increases them in aversion.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ قَالُوا۟ وَمَا ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ أَنَسْجُدُ لِمَا تَأْمُرُنَا وَزَادَهُمْ نُفُورًا

ayahArabic: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرٰجًا وَقَمَرًا مُّنِيرًا
ayahEnglish: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a [burning] lamp and luminous moon.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ خِلْفَةً لِّمَنْ أَرَادَ أَن يَذَّكَّرَ أَوْ أَرَادَ شُكُورًا
ayahEnglish: And it is He who has made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude.

ayahArabic: وَعِبَادُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ ٱلْجٰهِلُونَ قَالُوا۟ سَلٰمًا

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَدْعُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلٰهًا ءَاخَرَ وَلَا يَقْتُلُونَ ٱلنَّفْسَ ٱلَّتِى حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَزْنُونَ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذٰلِكَ يَلْقَ أَثَامًا
ayahEnglish: And those who do not invoke with Allāh another deity or kill the soul which Allāh has forbidden [to be killed], except by right, and do not commit unlawful sexual intercourse. And whoever should do that will meet a penalty.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ حَسَنٰتٍ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
ayahEnglish: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allāh will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allāh Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ حَسَنٰتٍ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا

ayahArabic: وَمَن تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صٰلِحًا فَإِنَّهُۥ يَتُوبُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَتَابًا
ayahEnglish: And he who repents and does righteousness does indeed turn to Allāh with [accepted] repentance.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَشْهَدُونَ ٱلزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِٱللَّغْوِ مَرُّوا۟ كِرَامًا
ayahEnglish: And [they are] those who do not testify to falsehood, and when they pass near ill speech, they pass by with dignity.

targetTranslation: they passed by (subject of the verb)

targetTranslation: when (followed by ذُكِّرُوا - they are reminded)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَمْ يَخِرُّوا۟ عَلَيْهَا صُمًّا وَعُمْيَانًا
ayahEnglish: And those who, when reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall upon them deaf and blind.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَمْ يَخِرُّوا۟ عَلَيْهَا صُمًّا وَعُمْيَانًا

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَٱجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
ayahEnglish: And those who say, "Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader [i.e., example] for the righteous."

ayahEnglish: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence.

ayahEnglish: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence.

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَا يَعْبَؤُا۟ بِكُمْ رَبِّى لَوْلَا دُعَآؤُكُمْ فَقَدْ كَذَّبْتُمْ فَسَوْفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامًۢا
ayahEnglish: Say, "What would my Lord care for you if not for your supplication?" For you [disbelievers] have denied, so it [i.e., your denial] is going to be adherent.
